title: Standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) Template

description: Regulatory and risk assessment guidelines for selecting governing law jurisdictions and forum venue options.

description: Negotiation rules and fallback positions for limiting aggregate and consequential damages liability.

title: GDPR Compliance and Data Privacy Playbook
description: Regulatory playbook outlining compliance requirements for data processing, data transfers, and standard contractual clauses.

title: Master Services Agreement (MSA) Boilerplate
description: Standard boilerplate containing general payment terms, net payment days, and invoice dispute mechanisms.

title: Payment Term Negotiation Strategy Guide
description: Strategic instructions for negotiating client payment terms, handling net 30/45/60, and setting interest on late payments.

title: Intellectual Property Transfer and Assignment Agreement
description: Standard template for assigning intellectual property rights from independent contractors to a hiring company.

title: Force Majeure Checklist and Draft Clause
description: Negotiation checklist for force majeure events, exclusions, and termination thresholds.

title: Dispute Resolution and Arbitration Procedures
description: Regulatory and procedural guidelines for executing binding commercial arbitration under AAA or JAMS rules.

title: Indemnification Risk Allocation Guide
description: Mutual indemnification boilerplate clauses for third-party intellectual property and general commercial claims.

title: SaaS Service Level Agreement (SLA) Template
description: Standard SaaS SLA boilerplate with uptime metrics, service credit formulas, and termination rights for chronic SLA failures.

title: CCPA / CPRA Consumer Privacy Compliance Guide
description: Regulatory guidance detailing requirements under the California Consumer Privacy Act and California Privacy Rights Act.

title: Termination for Convenience Playbook
description: Negotiation manual for handling termination for convenience, wind-down fees, and transitional services.

title: Assignment and Change of Control Playbook
description: Negotiation strategies for assignment restrictions, mergers, acquisitions, and change of control clauses.

title: HIPAA Business Associate Agreement (BAA) Template
description: Standard HIPAA BAA boilerplate for managing protected health information (PHI) between covered entities and business associates.

title: Software End-User License Agreement (EULA) Template

title: EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) Guidance

description: Standard clause template specifying audit rights, financial record retention, and payment discrepancy remedies.

description: Standard warranty disclaimer template containing exclusions for merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
